notes_zh:
### 接力面板重构（重点）

- **新增** 全新 Hero + 抽屉布局：顶部常驻显示当前条目、进度、控制按钮；队列折叠进抽屉，可手动展开/收起，也会随队列长度自动跟随，状态持久化
- **新增** 删除回收：从接力队列删除的条目不再直接丢失，而是进入剪贴板历史，窗口内提供 6 秒撤销提示
- **新增** 完成提示音可从 14 种 macOS 系统音效中挑选（原先只有默认 Pop）
- **新增** 自动化规则 pill 交互：单击弹菜单切换规则，点 ✕ 关闭自动化，右键也能切换
- **优化** 所有区块水平/垂直内边距统一，左右两侧边缘严格对齐
- **优化** 状态标记：完成从绿对勾改为绿点、跳过改用斜线圆圈、进度条跳过段颜色加深与"未到"拉开对比
- **优化** 退出按钮图标改为语义更清晰的"退出门"
- **优化** 循环开关从复选框改为蓝色 pill，视觉和旁边的按钮统一
- **优化** 面板字体整体加大 1pt 提升可读性
- **优化** 预览 diff 文字改灰色与主内容拉开对比；拆分条目继承源 App
- **修复** 粘贴时严格按自动化规则条件匹配（含源 App），避免某些规则在不符合场景下被误触发
- **修复** 删除队列最后一条时 Hero 面板轻微抖动
- **修复** 抽屉展开/折叠与窗口大小变化的动画闪烁
- **修复** 巨量文本（如整段终端缓冲）粘贴时 UI 卡顿
- **修复** 图片/文件条目删除后正确回收、拆分条目正确继承源 App

### 自动化

- **新增** 新动作「**运行捷径**」：将剪贴板内容送入指定的 macOS 捷径执行，适合接自定义工作流
- **新增** 新条件「**任意文本**」：规则不再需要绑定到特定类型或关键词
- **优化** 规则编辑器 UX 打磨

### 主窗口 / 快捷粘贴

- **新增** 分组持久化：分组编辑里勾选「永久保存此分组中的内容」，该分组的条目不会被「保留时长」自动清理或「清理数据」删除，可作为轻量 snippet 工具使用（感谢 @miniers）
- **新增** 快捷粘贴右键菜单新增「移入分组 / 移出分组」，无需打开主窗口即可整理（感谢 @miniers）
- **新增** 快捷粘贴面板内可直接按设置里的「打开管理器」快捷键呼出主窗口（感谢 @miniers）
- **修复** 主窗口「清空全部」会误删持久化分组的内容
- **修复** 极端情况下 SwiftData 升级未补 ZPRESERVESITEMS 列导致侧边栏分组空白
notes_en:
### Relay Panel Redesign (Highlights)

- **New** Hero + drawer layout — current clip, progress and controls sit permanently up top; the queue lives in a collapsible drawer that can be toggled manually or auto-follow queue size; state persists across restarts
- **New** Delete-to-recirculation — items deleted from the queue return to clipboard history with a 6-second undo toast right inside the panel
- **New** Pick from 14 macOS system sounds for the relay-complete cue (previously Pop only)
- **New** Automation pill interaction — click the top pill to open a rule switcher, click ✕ to clear, right-click also switches
- **Improve** Unified horizontal and vertical padding across every section; crisp edge alignment on both sides
- **Improve** State glyphs — green dot replaces the checkmark for done items, circle-slash for skipped, stronger progress-bar contrast between skipped and pending
- **Improve** Exit pill uses a clearer exit-door icon
- **Improve** Loop toggle is now a tinted pill, visually aligned with neighboring controls
- **Improve** All font sizes bumped +1pt across the panel for readability
- **Improve** Preview-diff text is muted gray; split clips inherit the source app
- **Fix** Paste path honors rule conditions strictly (including source app); rules no longer fire in contexts they weren't supposed to
- **Fix** Hero no longer jitters when you delete the last queue item
- **Fix** Drawer expand/collapse and window-size animations are smooth — no flicker
- **Fix** Massive paste (e.g. a whole terminal buffer) no longer freezes the UI
- **Fix** Image/file items recirculate correctly; split clips inherit the source app

### Automation

- **New** "Run Shortcut" action — pipe the clipboard into a macOS Shortcut for your own workflows
- **New** "Any text" condition — rules no longer have to hinge on type or keyword
- **Improve** Rule editor UX polish

### Main Window / Quick Paste

- **New** Preserved groups — flip "Preserve items" in a group's editor and its contents are excluded from retention cleanup and manual Clear Data; a lightweight snippets alternative (thanks @miniers)
- **New** Quick Paste right-click menu adds Add-to-Group / Remove-from-Group (thanks @miniers)
- **New** Quick Paste: trigger the configured "Open Manager" shortcut right from inside the panel (thanks @miniers)
- **Fix** Main-window "Clear All" no longer deletes items in preserved groups
- **Fix** Edge case where a SwiftData upgrade missing ZPRESERVESITEMS left sidebar groups empty
